# Security Foundation

**Framework**

Restrict a user’s access to particular features in your Mac app or daemon.

## Overview

This document was previously titled *Authorization Services Objective-C Reference,* and it replaced the `SFAuthorization` chapter of the *Security Objective-C API* document. The other chapters of that document have been replaced by [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SecurityInterface].

The Security Foundation framework contains a single class, [doc://com.apple.securityfoundation/documentation/SecurityFoundation/SFAuthorization], which allows you to restrict a user’s access to particular features in your Mac app or daemon.

## Classes

- **SFAuthorization**: A class that allows you to restrict a user’s access to particular features in your Mac app or daemon.
